Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: typefaces (type forms) [300194389], script and type forms [300201263], information form components [300201262], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Group of typefaces characterized by heavy faces and angular outlines, based on Gothic hand-written scripts.
以濃黑和稜角為特色的一組字體，以哥德手寫體為基礎。
Groep lettertypen die worden gekenmerkt door zware fronten en hoekige contouren. Ze zijn verwant aan Gotische handgeschreven schriften.
Gruppe von Schriften, die durch schwere Schriftarten und eckige Grundformen charakterisiert ist und auf gotischen Handschriften basiert.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, 16, Gutenberg's=of a family printers in Br. call blk ltr, others call Gothic, technical name is textura.
60, [seems to prefer blk-ltr but uses gothic a lot too]

Source.Source_ID: 2000093495/大英百科全書線上繁體中文版
2000086555/Stiebner et al., Bruckmann's Handbuch der Schrift (1992)
